middleware.description: Applied to all /api/v1/refunds/mine and /api/v1/refunds/{refund} customer routes. Ensures a customer can only request refunds against payments where they were the customer (payment.customer_type + payment.customer_id match auth()->id() OR auth()->athlete_id via the parent tenant_member relation). Blocks: (1) POST /refunds with a payment_id where the customer is not the actor, (2) GET /refunds/{refund} for refunds where refund.initiated_by_user_id != auth()->id() AND refund.customer_id != auth()->id(). On refusal returns 403 `REFUND_CUSTOMER_SCOPE_VIOLATION`.

Thin wrapper over entitlement.enforce that specifically checks the `refund_capture` entitlement. On refusal returns 402 `REFUND_CAPTURE_NOT_ENTITLED` with an upgrade CTA in the response envelope's .errors[0].meta.upgrade_url. Auto-applied via the `entitlement.enforce:refund_capture` middleware chain on every /api/v1/refunds/* route.

consumed.note: The permission-based authorize middleware wraps the ability checks defined in policies.json + permissions.json.
Rate-limit bucket for /refunds/mine customer path. Default: 30 requests/min per authenticated user. Prevents refund-request abuse from a compromised session.
Rate-limit bucket for admin refund routes. Default: 120 requests/min per authenticated admin. Generous — admin workflows may bulk-process.
Rate-limit bucket for platform-plane cross-tenant support routes. Default: 60 requests/min per platform_admin.
